name: Raja Deshi Cow
description: Magnificent Deshi cow with excellent muscle structure. Perfect for Qurbani, well-fed with natural grass and grains. Disease-free and vaccinated.

name: Golden Frisian
description: Premium Frisian cross breed, heavy weight with maximum meat production. Ideal for large family Qurbani.

name: Black Beauty Goat
description: Famous Black Bengal goat, known for tender and flavorful meat. Perfect for Qurbani, healthy and active.

name: Shah Baghdadi
description: Premium Shahwal breed, massive frame with excellent meat distribution. Show quality animal.

name: White Saanen
description: Imported Saanen breed, highest weight in goats. Premium quality meat, perfect for commercial Qurbani.

name: Australian Angus
description: Australian Angus cross, excellent meat-to-bone ratio. Premium beef quality, ideal for Qurbani.
